Variables.Name: bAllowSurfelRayTracing
Variables.Description: Whether to allow surfel ray tracing for ray traced dynamic indirect lighting and ambient occlusion.

Variables.Name: SurfelVoxelSize
Variables.Description: The size in unreal unit of a voxel.

Variables.Name: SurfelHierarchyDimension
Variables.Description: The size of the dimension of Surfel Bricks. Each brick contain 4x4x4 voxels.

Variables.Name: IrradianceVolumeCellSize
Variables.Description: The cell world size of the dimension of Surfel Irradiance Volume.

Variables.Name: IrradianceVolumeDimension
Variables.Description: The size of the dimension of Surfel Irradiance Volume.

Variables.Name: IrradianceVolumeMipLevels
Variables.Description: The number of mip levels of Surfel Irradiance Volume.

Variables.Name: IrradianceMipScale
Variables.Description: The brick world size scale of each mip levels of Surfel Irradiance Volume.

Variables.Name: IrradianceVolumeOffset
Variables.Description: The position offset of Surfel Irradiance Volume.

Variables.Name: IrradianceVolumeCellDim
Variables.Description: The number of positions where a probe can be in the Irradiance Volume Cell. Value 5 means 5x5x5 positions.

Variables.Name: SurfelInjectSingleSize
Variables.Description: The size n of inject single mesh to Hierarchical Surfel of Surfel Bricks. Each brick contains 4x4x4 voxels. Default n=16 means 16x16x16 bricks.

Variables.Name: SurfelInjectSingleDistance
Variables.Description: The distance within which a primitive can be inject into the surfel.

Variables.Name: SurfelPoolInitScale
Variables.Description: The init size of the sparse surfel pool. Default 1x is 16 MB. Turn larger the pool size to avoid losing GI when resizing the pool, but consume more video memory.

Variables.Name: bSupportEmissive
Variables.Description: Whether emissive object should affect GI

Variables.Name: bSupportTOD
Variables.Description: Whether GI should support time of day, turning this off will cause significant delay of GI convergence in scenes with TOD
